# Propel Capital

> Sweden's most active angel club. Propel Capital backs bold pre-seed tech founders with first-cheque capital and 120+ hands-on angels, powered by Sting since 2014.

Propel Capital invests 600 kSEK in pre-seed Swedish tech startups (400 kSEK upfront as a convertible note, 200 kSEK as equity in the next round) and plugs founders into a network of 120+ active angel investors. A Propel investment is paired with acceptance into the Sting Core program. To date Propel has made 230+ investments with a 57% follow-on rate, and is currently deploying Propel Capital VII (27 MSEK, 39 angels, launched 2025).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Propel Capital, portfolio, investment process, angel network, and FAQ.
